note: Re-reviewed the 16 near-dup clusters on the MODERN re-voiced texts (E5 >=0.93). Re-voicing collapsed several into true duplicates. 'merge' = keep survivor, fold the twin's verses in; 'keep' = distinct facet; 'review' = your call.

recommendations.why: 'Steady the mind' recurs 4x. Keep 106 (breath-specific) and 121 (steady mind = calm); 281 and 308 just restate 121.
Verbatim duplicate: 'No honest effort is ever wasted.' (2:40 & 6:40). Merge.
18 = don't be ruled by highs/lows/wanting more; 158 = don't be ruled by every like/dislike. Overlapping but different framing — keep both.
'Let go of craving, ownership, ego' (2:71) and 'ego, arrogance, mine' (18:53) are the same. Merge.
44 = work as contribution, not gain; 93 = work to grow, not gain. Distinct motives — keep both.
'Better your own path flawed than another's perfect' — the famous 3:35 = 18:47 repetition. Merge; keep the tighter 56, add 18:47.
'Do the work without letting it define you' (4:14) vs 'without getting tangled in it' (9:9) — same idea. Merge.
'Give yourself fully, and peace follows' (18:62) subsumes 'commit fully, stay disciplined, peace follows' (4:39). Merge; keep 327.
105 = a quiet mind frees you; 237 = clear understanding frees you. Different mechanisms — keep both.
'Give up the craving, not the work' (18:2) and 'drop the selfish motive, not the work' (6:2) are the same. Merge; keep 288.
'Let praise and blame pass through you' (12:19) is the cleaner form of 'stay level through praise and blame' (6:7). Merge; keep 219.
'Don't mistake the surface/one piece for the whole' — 7:24 & 18:22 coincide. Merge; keep 156.
'Be part of everything, attached to nothing' (9:4) and 'support everything, cling to nothing' (13:15) are the same. Merge; keep 177.
'The same thread runs through everyone' — 9:18 & 18:20 restate. Merge; keep 182.
240 = craving chains you to restless action (consequence); 244 = greed/restlessness surging means craving is driving (diagnostic). Keep both.
292 = don't quit hard work to dodge discomfort; 294 = don't dread hard tasks or crave easy ones. Close — 294 adds the crave-easy half. Your call whether to merge.
